title: agentic-osint-agent: A LangGraph ReAct agent for autonomous public-source investigation
description: An agentic OSINT investigator built on LangGraph that accepts a target domain or entity and autonomously executes a multi-step investigation: WHOIS lookup, Shodan InternetDB query, GitHub dorking, Wayback Machine analysis, and DNS enumeration. ReAct prompting drives tool selection; explicit state machine governs termination. Includes a real evaluation suite across 20 public domains.
